examples.eng: For ten days I continued in this state.
examples.ru: Десять дней я пребывал в таком состоянии.

examples.eng: The rain continued to sprinkle.
We continued to work into the night.
examples.ru: Мы продолжали работать до глубокой ночи.

examples.eng: The battle continued late into the night.
Fitting continued for more than 5 minutes.
The city continued to shrink.
Money has continued to flow in.
The flood of refugees continued unabated.
The debate continued until 3 p.m.
examples.ru: Прения продолжались до трёх часов дня.

examples.eng: We continued our journey by rail.
examples.ru: Мы продолжили путешествие по железной дороге.

examples.eng: He continued rapidly up the path.
The wind had continued true north.
examples.ru: Ветер по-прежнему дул точно с севера.

examples.eng: She continued by citing more facts.
examples.ru: Она продолжила и привела ещё ряд фактов.

examples.eng: We continued on at a whirlwind pace.
An uneasy peace continued until 1939.
He continued after a perceptible pause.
The Greeks continued to fight manfully.
He continued to live in idle dalliance.
Elsa continued as if nothing was amiss.
examples.ru: Эльза продолжила, как ни в чём не бывало.

examples.eng: Ray continued to wrestle with the wheel.
We continued along the road for some time.
examples.ru: Какое-то время мы продолжали идти по дороге.

examples.eng: Trade continued to fluctuate in the 1880s.
examples.ru: Уровень торговли в 1880-х гг. вновь был подвержен колебаниям.

examples.eng: The soldiers continued plundering for days.
The crowd continued to scream abuse at him.
examples.ru: Толпа продолжала выкрикивать оскорбления в его адрес.

examples.eng: The investigation continued without result.
Development on the project continued apace.
The strike continued for another four weeks.
She continued in the direction of the hills.
examples.ru: Она продолжила двигаться в сторону холмов.

examples.eng: After a brief ceasefire, fighting continued.
He picked up his book and continued reading.
examples.ru: Он поднял книгу и продолжил чтение.
